_comment: HoudiniMind core config v12 — safe to edit. Agent never touches this file.
_backend_note: Ollama supports both local and cloud models. Set model to any ollama pull'd model.
_context_note: 32,768 token context budget. Needs to fit: system prompt (~2.5k) + tool schemas (~6k) + scene (~5k) + history.
_tool_rounds_note: Reduced from 40 to 16. Higher limits hide loop failures and increase latency.
_plan_timeout_note: 45s gives cloud models (qwen3.5:397b-cloud via Ollama) enough headroom to return a plan JSON. 20s was too tight and caused silent fallthrough to unplanned builds.
_speed_note: Reuse repeated observations and cap expensive screenshot vision analysis to keep build turns responsive.
_routing_note: OPT-2: model_routing keys are now respected by _get_model_for(). Set lighter/faster models for quick/planning tasks to reduce latency. Empty string falls back to main 'model'.
_routing_force_note: Tasks listed here always use their routed model when configured, even if the UI chat model is different.
_path_note: Use '__auto__' so data_dir resolves relative to this config file at runtime. Never hardcode an absolute path because it breaks on other machines.
_rag_note: hybrid_search=true enables BM25 + vector cosine similarity. Requires embed_model pulled in Ollama.
_tools_note: max_tools_per_request limits how many tool schemas are sent per LLM call (saves context tokens).
_semantic_note: Safety defaults: keep semantic scoring on, but skip risky multi-view OpenGL renders unless explicitly enabled.
_plan_note: OPT-3: plan_enabled=true is now gated by _query_is_complex(); short/trivial queries skip the extra LLM round-trip automatically.
_perf_notes: Perf tuning: 1 research iteration, 2k RAG context budget, 20 tool schemas (down from 40 rounds), startup tool-embedding warmup, lightweight verification.
_schedule_note: Scheduled AutoResearch: set schedule_enabled=true to auto-run research on topics every schedule_interval_h hours.
schedule_topics: Houdini SOP procedural techniques and node best practices
_scope_note: modeling_fx_only filters the tool set and prompt to modelling + FX (sims, VOPs, VDB). Disables texturing/materials/lookdev/USD/render tools.
_fast_execution_note: fast_execution tightens error recovery and caches scene observations when no writes happened since the last turn.
_runtime_note: Model-size-specific planning/vision overrides have been removed. Planning and vision now follow the explicit runtime settings only.
